items.title: [正面] For nigh on a decade I have been enthralled with t...
items.summary:
For nigh on a decade I have been enthralled with the cosmic horror of Lovecraft and his eldritch spawn, their tragedies cut through to the core of what it means to live, think, and dream. I have been broken down by the existential dread, terrified by the malformed aliens, and always hoped for a better end. Morimens is a perfection encaspulation of what Cosmic Horror is, personifying that in ever fibre of its being. The Art design is stunning, grotesque and awe-inspiring. The Gameplay is quick to grasp but brutally challenging near the end. The Gacha isnt even that bad as it dishes out an ungodly amount of loot. 

More people should play this game. Its Free. Like How?
